channel.title: Reverse-Shell on Logan Dawson
channel.description: Recent content in Reverse-Shell on Logan Dawson

item.title: Kobold — HackTheBox Season 10 Walkthrough
item.description: Kobold HTB walkthrough: exploit MCPJam Inspector RCE (CVE-2026-23744), PrivateBin LFI, and a newgrp Docker group escape on this Easy Linux box.

item.title: Gavel — HackTheBox Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Gavel walkthrough: exploit an exposed .git directory, PDO emulated prepared statement SQLi, and a PHP sandbox self-destruct to root a medium Linux box.

item.title: AirTouch — HackTheBox Walkthrough
item.description: AirTouch HTB medium box walkthrough: crack WPA-PSK, capture MSCHAPv2 via evil twin with real RADIUS certs, pivot through WiFi VLANs to root. Full methodology.

item.title: CCTV — HackTheBox Season 10 Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox CCTV walkthrough: JWT forgery against ZoneMinder, filter RCE to www-data, motionEye SHA-1 auth bypass for root. Easy Linux box.

item.title: Eighteen — HackTheBox Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Eighteen writeup: exploit BadSuccessor (CVE-2025-53779) on Windows Server 2025 DC via MSSQL impersonation, hash cracking, and dMSA abuse for DCSync.

item.title: Interpreter — HackTheBox Season 10 Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Interpreter writeup: exploit Mirth Connect CVE-2023-43208 pre-auth RCE, crack PBKDF2 hashes, and escape f-string eval() sandbox to root. Medium Linux box.

item.title: Pirate — HackTheBox Season 10 Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Pirate walkthrough: Hard Windows DC box featuring ADFS DKM key extraction, gMSA abuse, NTLM relay with RBCD, and SPN hijacking for Domain Admin. Detailed methodology.

item.title: Pterodactyl — HackTheBox Season 10 Walkthrough
item.description: Pterodactyl HTB walkthrough: exploit CVE-2025-49132 LFI→RCE via pearcmd.php, crack credentials, then chain CVE-2025-6018 + CVE-2025-6019 udisks2 for root.

item.title: WingData — HackTheBox Season 10 Walkthrough
item.description: WingTheBox WingData writeup: exploit CVE-2025-47812 RCE in Wing FTP Server, crack salted SHA-256 hashes, then escape tarfile sandboxing via CVE-2025-4517 PATH_MAX overflow for root.

item.title: Monitorsfour — HackTheBox Walkthrough
item.description: MonitorsFour HTB writeup: exploit Cacti CVE-2025-24367 RCE, then pivot through an unauthenticated Docker API to escape to the Windows host. Medium difficulty.

item.title: Responder — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Responder walkthrough: exploit LFI to steal NTLMv2 hashes via UNC path injection, crack with John, and gain WinRM access. Very Easy Windows box.

item.title: Oopsie — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Oopsie walkthrough: exploit IDOR, broken access control, and PHP upload to get a shell, then escalate via SUID PATH hijacking to root.

item.title: Unified — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Unified walkthrough: exploit Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) against UniFi Network 6.4.54, manipulate MongoDB to gain admin, and recover root SSH creds.

item.title: Archetype — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Archetype walkthrough: exploit MSSQL xp_cmdshell via SMB credential leak, escalate to Administrator using PSReadLine history. Windows easy box.

item.title: NanoCorp — HackTheBox Walkthrough
item.description: NanoCorp HTB writeup: NTLM capture via ZIP upload, BloodHound ACL abuse, and CVE-2024-0670 Checkmk MSI repair LPE on Windows Server 2022.
